description: A 3D printing technician needs to prepare a skull model from the loaded CT Cranium DICOM scan by removing the cervical vertebrae to ensure the model sits flat. Create a bone segmentation mask using a threshold of 226 to 3071 HU. Remove all mask content from axial slices 1 through 10 while ensuring the rest of the skull remains segmented. Export the modified mask as a NIfTI file to /home/ga/Documents/cleaned_skull.nii.gz. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
